This sculpture was created in 1971 by the artist Fritz Koenig and was originally located between the twin towers of the WTC. It miraculously survived the collapse of the buildings and was returned to Battery Park as it was, without repairs, at the request of the artist. We found the work very interesting knowing that it was the only one recovered after the attacks. I recommend you to take a look at Battery Park.
Koenigsphere, a symbol of peace that survived the severe damage of September 11. Recovered from Ground Zero and has been given a new place in Liberty Park. Now a symbol of hope and resilience.
